heading: Tuesday Night
text: Chance of a mountain snow shower through midnight. Remaining mostly cloudy north and in the southern Greens, clouds decreasing elsewhere in the south. Lows from 5 to 15 above, with northern cold hollows around zero. West to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, and gusting to 30 mph, diminishing and become northwest overnight.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Valley highs in the upper 20s to lower 30s, with some mid 20s far north, and some mid 30s in southeastern valleys and in the Hudson Valley. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming southwest in the afternoon.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Clear to partly cloudy, then clouds increasing late near the international border. Lows from the mid teens to lower 20s, some mid 20s in the broad valleys west. Winds becoming light and variable east of the Greens, and becoming south to southeast 5 to 15 mph from the Green Mountains westward.
